abilities.name: Lead Fever
abilities.description:
Overload your gun for 6s: ranged attacks fire 4 pellets in a loose, random scatter that knock enemies back (full damage per pellet).
Mana: 25  Cooldown: 20s

abilities.name: Deadlight Snare
abilities.description:
Throw a trap net forward and dash backward. On hit, pulls nearby enemies together and stuns them for 2s.
Mana: 20  Cooldown: 20s

abilities.name: Calamity Slug
abilities.description:
Channel 1s, then fire a huge piercing slug (50 damage) that knocks survivors sideways.
Mana: 30  Cooldown: 25s
